message:
fix: exclude .out files from crate package and fix match arm syntax

- Cargo.toml: add `!**/*.out` to the `include` list so stray compiler
  output files are excluded from the published crate archive
- conformance/src/traceability.rs: restructure match arm with block
  braces to satisfy rustfmt and eliminate the dangling-else-style
  formatting that clippy/rustfmt 2024+ flags as ambiguous

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
